name: Chronicle 2.0
tagline: AI-powered presentation builder that produces polished decks without generic, over-designed AI filler.
problem: Most AI presentation tools generate visually bloated, template-heavy slides that look synthetic and undermine credibility. Chronicle 2.0 addresses the gap between speed and quality by letting users build clean, structured presentations with AI assistance that stays out of the way. Teams and individuals waste hours reformatting AI output; Chronicle aims to eliminate that cleanup step.
useCases: Creating investor pitch decks with a refined, non-generic aesthetic
Building internal team presentations and strategy documents quickly
Producing client-facing reports or proposals without heavy design effort
Turning written briefs or notes into structured slide narratives using AI
